defeat_zacharias.name: The Lightningsworn Gang
defeat_zacharias.description: Zacharias Lightningsworn and his gang of Spark Thieves have been terrorizing the King's Road. The village guard has asked you to deal with them.

steps.description: Defeat Zacharias Lightningsworn and his gang on the King's Road

meet_elara.name: A Message for Sylwen
meet_elara.description: Sylwen is worried about her sister Elara, who ventured toward the ruins days ago and hasn't returned. Find Elara and hear what she has to say.
